name: @iwritec0de/conform
description: Automated validation for Claude Code plugins and shared .claude configurations — structural checks and integration tests

scripts.build: cd cli && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp -r src/lint/schemas dist/lint/schemas
scripts.test: cd cli && NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --config jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:watch: cd cli && NODE_OPTIONS='--experimental-vm-modules' npx jest --config jest.config.cjs --watch
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test && pnpm run test:fixtures
scripts.release:check: pnpm run test:all && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run build && pnpm pack --dry-run
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run test:all && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build
